text:
Author: sunpoet
Date: Sun May 25 12:37:16 2014

Log:
  - Add LICENSE
  - Pass maintainership to submitter

  Submitted by:	Muhammad Moinur Rahman <5u623l20@gmail.com>

Modified:
  head/devel/p5-Thread-Queue-Duplex/Makefile

Modified: head/devel/p5-Thread-Queue-Duplex/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/devel/p5-Thread-Queue-Duplex/Makefile	Sun May 25 12:37:11 2014	(r355171)
+++ head/devel/p5-Thread-Queue-Duplex/Makefile	Sun May 25 12:37:16 2014	(r355172)
@@ -7,9 +7,14 @@ CATEGORIES=	devel perl5
 MASTER_SITES=	CPAN
 PKGNAMEPREFIX=	p5-
 
-MAINTAINER=	ports@FreeBSD.org
+MAINTAINER=	5u623l20@gmail.com
 COMMENT=	Thread-safe request/response queue with identifiable elements
 
+LICENSE=	AFL21
+LICENSE_NAME=	Academic Free License version 2.1
+LICENSE_FILE=	${WRKSRC}/License.txt
+LICENSE_PERMS=	auto-accept dist-mirror dist-sell pkg-mirror pkg-sell
+
 USES=		perl5
 USE_PERL5=	configure
